def create_user_response(user):
    return {
        "id": user.id,
        "name": user.name,
        "email": user.email,
        "role": user.role,
        "created_at": user.created_at.isoformat(),
    }


def create_admin_user_response(user):
    return {
        "id": user.id,
        "name": user.name,
        "email": user.email,
        "role": user.role,
        "created_at": user.created_at.isoformat(),
        "last_login": user.last_login.isoformat(),
    }


def serialize_user_for_export(user):
    return {
        "id": user.id,
        "name": user.name,
        "email": user.email,
        "role": user.role,
        "created_at": user.created_at.isoformat(),
    }


def build_api_user_payload(user, include_admin_fields=False):
    result = {
        "id": user.id,
        "name": user.name,
        "email": user.email,
        "role": user.role,
        "created_at": user.created_at.isoformat(),
    }
    if include_admin_fields:
        result["last_login"] = user.last_login.isoformat()
    return result
